features.name: pods table migration
features.spec: Create pods table with RLS and all columns per PRD Section 6.2
features.test: SELECT * FROM pods WHERE account_id = 'x' returns empty array without error

features.name: pod_id FKs on board_instances and conversations
features.spec: Add nullable pod_id FK to board_instances and conversations with indexes
features.test: SELECT pod_id FROM board_instances LIMIT 1 — column exists, nullable

features.name: board_routes, task_dags, task_dependencies tables
features.spec: Create 3 task-flow tables per PRD Section 7.8
features.test: All 3 tables exist with correct FK constraints

features.name: tasks.result and tasks.dag_id columns
features.spec: ALTER TABLE tasks ADD COLUMN result jsonb; ADD COLUMN dag_id uuid FK task_dags
features.test: SELECT result, dag_id FROM tasks LIMIT 1 — columns exist

features.name: integration_tools table
features.spec: Create integration_tools table per PRD Section 8.9
features.test: Insert + select round-trip succeeds

features.name: heartbeat_configs and execution_log tables
features.spec: Create both autonomy tables per PRD Section 9.6
features.test: Insert heartbeat_config with cron_expression, verify FK cascades

features.name: Seed Anthropic and Ollama backbone definitions
features.spec: INSERT into backbone_definitions for slug=anthropic and slug=ollama
features.test: SELECT slug FROM backbone_definitions WHERE slug IN ('anthropic','ollama') returns 2 rows

features.name: AnthropicAdapter
features.spec: backend/src/backbone/adapters/anthropic.adapter.ts — Anthropic Messages API, SSE streaming, supportsToolExecution=true
features.test: healthCheck({ api_key: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }) returns { healthy: true }

features.name: OllamaAdapter
features.spec: backend/src/backbone/adapters/ollama.adapter.ts — Ollama REST API, NDJSON streaming, supportsToolExecution=false
features.test: With Ollama Docker running, healthCheck returns healthy

features.name: supportsToolExecution on BackboneAdapter interface
features.spec: Add optional supportsToolExecution?(): boolean and ToolContextDefinition to backbone-adapter.interface.ts
features.test: Existing adapters compile without changes (method is optional)

features.name: Register Anthropic and Ollama adapters in BackboneModule
features.spec: Add to providers array, inject in constructor, register in onModuleInit()
features.test: Backend logs show 'anthropic, ollama' in adapter list on startup

features.name: Pod-level cascade in BackboneRouterService
features.spec: Insert Pod step between Category and Account default in resolve() cascade
features.test: Pod with specific backbone connection resolvedFrom === 'pod'

features.name: CreatePodDto and UpdatePodDto
features.spec: DTOs with validation decorators, auto-slugify name if slug not provided
features.test: class-validator rejects empty name, accepts valid payload

features.name: PodsService
features.spec: backend/src/pods/pods.service.ts — CRUD mirroring BoardsService pattern
features.test: CRUD round-trip: create pod, fetch by slug, update name, delete

features.name: PodsController
features.spec: backend/src/pods/pods.controller.ts — REST endpoints at /accounts/:accountId/pods
features.test: GET /accounts/:id/pods returns 200 with empty array for new account

features.name: PodsModule registered in AppModule
features.spec: Create pods.module.ts and add to app.module.ts imports
features.test: Backend starts without DI errors; /accounts/:id/pods returns 200

features.name: ConversationsService pod_id support
features.spec: Add pod_id to CreateConversationDto, findAll filter, create(), sendMessage() backbone routing
features.test: Create conversation with pod_id, assert it's returned in findOne

features.name: BoardsService pod_id support
features.spec: Add pod_id to CreateBoardDto/UpdateBoardDto, findAll filter, create(), update()
features.test: Create board with pod_id; list boards filtered by pod_id

features.name: BoardRoutingModule structure
features.spec: board-routing.module.ts with conditional BullMQ queue 'board-routing-jobs'
features.test: Module loads; GET /accounts/:id/board-routing/routes returns 200

features.name: BoardRoutingService — route CRUD
features.spec: createRoute, findAllRoutes, findRoute, updateRoute, deleteRoute, triggerRoute
features.test: Create route connecting two boards; appears in findAll

features.name: BoardRoutingProcessor (BullMQ)
features.spec: @Processor('board-routing-jobs') — fetch task, apply transform, create in target board, log
features.test: Enqueue job with mock task; verify task appears in target board

features.name: CoordinatorService — goal decomposition
features.spec: decomposeGoal() — send goal to backbone, parse JSON subtask list, create tasks + task_dag + task_dependencies
features.test: With backbone configured, call decomposeGoal; assert N tasks + 1 DAG row created

features.name: DAGExecutorService — event-triggered dependency resolution
features.spec: onTaskCompleted(taskId, result) — store result, find downstream tasks, check all upstreams done, dispatch ready tasks
features.test: Create 2-task DAG; complete upstream; assert downstream status changes

features.name: TasksService integration — trigger DAG on task completion
features.spec: In tasks.service.ts update(), when status reaches Done, call dagExecutorService.onTaskCompleted() fire-and-forget
features.test: Update task to done; DAGExecutor fires (spy on method)

features.name: ToolRegistryService
features.spec: integrations/tool-registry.service.ts — CRUD + buildToolContext(accountId, requiredTools)
features.test: Create tool definition; buildToolContext(['my-tool']) returns definition array

features.name: SkillsService required_tools frontmatter parsing
features.spec: Parse YAML frontmatter from skill.content, extract required_tools array, expose getRequiredTools(skill)
features.test: Skill with frontmatter 'required_tools: [web-search]' returns ['web-search']

features.name: ConversationsService buildToolContext integration
features.spec: In sendMessage(), collect required_tools from skills, call buildToolContext(), attach as tool_context to backbone router
features.test: Conversation with skill with required_tools — BackboneRouter.send receives tool_context

features.name: Adapter tool_context translation (Anthropic + OpenRouter)
features.spec: anthropic.adapter: translate tool_context to Anthropic tools[] format; openrouter.adapter: to OpenAI tools[] format
features.test: sendMessage with tool_context builds correct request body for each adapter

features.name: HeartbeatModule
features.spec: heartbeat.module.ts with conditional BullMQ queue 'heartbeat-jobs', all providers + controller
features.test: Module loads; GET /accounts/:id/heartbeat/configs returns 200

features.name: HeartbeatService
features.spec: createConfig, findAll, findOne, update, delete, toggle, trigger, scheduleAll() on init
features.test: Create heartbeat config with cron; trigger manually; assert execution_log entry created

features.name: HeartbeatProcessor (BullMQ)
features.spec: @Processor('heartbeat-jobs') — check circuit breaker, dry_run, max_tasks_per_run, call backbone, write log
features.test: Manual trigger produces execution_log entry with status completed or dry_run

features.name: CircuitBreakerService
features.spec: In-memory failure tracking per configId; auto-disable after threshold; recordFailure/Success/isOpen
features.test: Record N failures; assert circuit opens and config becomes inactive

features.name: ExecutionLogService
features.spec: create, findAll (with filters: trigger_type, status, pod_id, board_id, pagination), findOne
features.test: Insert 3 entries; findAll with status filter returns correct subset

features.name: Pod TypeScript types
features.spec: frontend/src/types/pod.ts — Pod, CreatePodPayload, UpdatePodPayload, HeartbeatConfig, ExecutionLog, BoardRoute, TaskDAG
features.test: TypeScript compilation passes with no errors in types file

features.name: Pod server actions

features.test: getPods() returns empty array for new account without throwing

features.name: usePods hooks
features.spec: frontend/src/hooks/use-pods.ts — usePods, usePod, useCreatePod, useUpdatePod, useDeletePod with react-query
features.test: usePods() returns empty data array without error
